message:
fix(version_check): replace hand-rolled parser with semver crate for correct pre-release ordering

The hand-rolled version parser split on '.' and stripped pre-release
suffixes, making 1.2.3-dev equal to 1.2.3. This caused pre-release
builds to incorrectly suppress update notices.

Replace with semver::Version-based parse_semver_like that correctly:
- Orders pre-release versions (1.2.3-dev < 1.2.3 per semver spec)
- Strips build metadata so it never affects comparison
- Handles two-segment versions (e.g. "1.2") by appending ".0"
- Returns VersionCheckResult::Failed for invalid cached versions
  instead of silently returning UpToDate

Extract check_cached_at() with explicit path and version parameters
for testability. Add tests for invalid cache, build metadata stripping,
and pre-release ordering.

Fixes bd-1kwsm.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
